label: Chemical
description: Defines a chemical substance that pawns can become addicted to.

addictionHediff.label: Addiction hediff
addictionHediff.description: HediffDef applied when a pawn becomes addicted to this chemical.

toleranceHediff.label: Tolerance hediff
toleranceHediff.description: HediffDef representing tolerance buildup for this chemical.

canBinge.label: Can binge
canBinge.description: If true, pawns can binge on this chemical.

canBeAddicted.label: Can be addicted
canBeAddicted.description: If true, pawns can become addicted to this chemical.

generateAddictionGenes.label: Generate addiction genes
generateAddictionGenes.description: If true, genes related to this chemical's addiction can be generated.

geneOverdoseChanceFactorResist.label: Gene overdose chance factor (resist)
geneOverdoseChanceFactorResist.description: Multiplier on overdose chance for pawns with a chemical-resistance gene.

geneOverdoseChanceFactorImmune.label: Gene overdose chance factor (immune)
geneOverdoseChanceFactorImmune.description: Multiplier on overdose chance for pawns with a chemical-immunity gene.

geneToleranceBuildupFactorResist.label: Gene tolerance buildup factor (resist)
geneToleranceBuildupFactorResist.description: Multiplier on tolerance buildup for pawns with a chemical-resistance gene.

geneToleranceBuildupFactorImmune.label: Gene tolerance buildup factor (immune)
geneToleranceBuildupFactorImmune.description: Multiplier on tolerance buildup for pawns with a chemical-immunity gene.

onGeneratedAddictedToleranceChance.label: On generated addicted: tolerance chance
onGeneratedAddictedToleranceChance.description: Probability that a pawn generated with this addiction also has an active tolerance hediff.

onGeneratedAddictedEvents.label: On generated addicted: events
onGeneratedAddictedEvents.description: Hediff givers run on pawns generated with this addiction.
